examples: Turbidity and particulate distribution do not have obvious effects on the inactivation rate of MS-2 coliphage.
Objective to study the feasibility of using phage as the indicator of inactivation of virus with E. coliphage F2 as the indicator.
Methods Suspension quantitative test was used to observe the resistance of E. coliphage F2 to 7 common chemical disinfectants and to compare parallelly with poliovirus.
